groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, vehicle_then_aquarium direction, random ordering #1.

sentences.text: Composite armor arrays on modern main battle platforms give the tank superior protection against shaped charges.

Composite armor arrays on modern main battle platforms give the tank superior protection against shaped charges. During the liberation, the townspeople draped flowers and flags over the hull of the first allied tank to arrive.

Composite armor arrays on modern main battle platforms give the tank superior protection against shaped charges. During the liberation, the townspeople draped flowers and flags over the hull of the first allied tank to arrive. Multi-spectral camouflage netting reduces the visual and thermal signature of the tank during static defense operations.

Composite armor arrays on modern main battle platforms give the tank superior protection against shaped charges. Multi-spectral camouflage netting reduces the visual and thermal signature of the tank during static defense operations. Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats.
